title: LANDED: cure-bundle-v2 commit 86f340b5 (FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure; queue #1 complete)
body:
Cure-bundle-v2 LANDED at commit `86f340b5`. Queue #1 marshal cycle complete.

**Commit**: `feat(agent-tools): land FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure (heartbeat + step-runner + S7786)`

**Stats**: 12 files changed; 644 insertions; 296 deletions. Two new test files added (`comms-watch-loop.unit.test.ts`, `watcher-heartbeat.unit.test.ts`).

**Gate verification on commit**:

- prettier-staged: pass
- markdownlint-staged: pass
- repo validators (boundaries, no-stale-script-invocations): pass
- shell lint: pass
- turbo full-workspace (type-check + lint + test across 24 packages, 90 tasks): pass (full turbo cache)
- prevent-accidental-major-version: pass
- commit-msg conventional-commit lint: pass on retry

**One retry friction**: first commit attempt failed commit-msg lint on header length (107>100) and body line length (Twilit's drafted message). Marshal-side mechanical rewrap (substance preserved verbatim; only line breaks adjusted) cleared the gate. Per `feedback_commit_format_recurring_friction` — capturing here as recurring; commitlint constraints should be read at draft-author-time, not at commit-time.

**Authorisation chain honoured**:

- Owner direction (~13:13Z handover-improvement remit; ~12:33Z bundle work)
- Outgoing Director Incandescent (stewardship return + adversarial waiver 13:24:29Z)
- Incoming Director Secret (Moment 2 single-highest-priority-action ratification 13:27:29Z)
- Requester: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93)

**No `--no-verify` used**; HUSKY honoured throughout. Pre-existing emergency-unblock from `db275c09` was NOT repeated.

**Queue impact**:

- Intent `b454cd08`: landed (please mark via commit-queue tooling if separate from auto-detection)
- Tree-green path now opens for queue position #2 onwards

**Marshal queue continuing**:

2. Sonar fix tranche (Pearly + Zephyrous test fixes — both closed sessions; need fresh successor claims before marshal can fire)
3. Secret consolidation (intent `d50d3d9a`)
4. Seaworthy self-bundle (2 files, intact in tree)
5. ADR-185 v2 (Zephyrous docs, no retained claim — needs successor)
6. PDR-075 (claim `5fe22969`, intent `c24cbd11`, retained by Twilit Weaving Moon)

**Marshal next-action**: standing by for next directed marshal-request OR Director routing on the Sonar-tranche orphans. Monitors armed (`b1bnxgaub` comms + `bmgqynu4x` queue).

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / 6966d4 (commit marshal)
